title: Limitless
description:
A light fabric modpack focussing on performance, QoL and compatibility.

Supports Optifine-exclusive texturepacks.
body:
A light fabric modpack focussing on performance, QoL, immersion, ambience and compatibility.


<details>
<summary>Why Limitless?</summary>

Unlike many other performance improving modpacks, Limitless focusses on having as little no negative visual impact on the game while still increasing framerates.
Other modpacks might give a greater performance boost, so if your PC struggles to run minecraft at all, this may not be the modpack you're looking for.

This modpack could be interesting for you if:
- you don't want to lose any details while still boosting fps
- you want to use refined optifine texturepacks
- you want more customizability
- minecrafts controls and QoL aren't enough
- you want to easily host a multiplayer world for you and your friends

</details>

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- immersive ambient sound
- sound physics
- improved weather
- connected textures
- minimap
- worldmap
- waypoints
- HUD elements (time, biome, coordinates etc.)
- light level overlay
- slime chunk overlay
- adjustable zoom
- gamma and fullbright
- world hosting
- works with optifine resourcepacks (custom skies, world events etc.)
- shader support
- mod menu
- better performance without compromising visual details

</details>



Will work along all Fabric content mods (performance mods may cause conflicts).

Updating the included mods manually might break the modpack.

**Since modpack version 1.1.0 the "Tweakermore" mod is disabled by default.**
This is because this mod (and the "Tweakeroo" mod from before pack version 1.1) is blacklisted on some multiplayer servers. I recommend not enabling unless you plan to stick to singleplayer.
